_comment: Spatial contracts — positional & computed-style assertions verified at runtime via Playwright. Catches: missing CSS cascade, off-scale computed font-size, sticky elements that aren't sticky, children overflowing parents, siblings not aligned, element overlaps, WCAG AA contrast failures.

position_rules.description: Bottom nav must touch viewport bottom
Top navbar must be sticky at y=0 on scroll
Badge must sit at top of its plan card (possibly extending above)

containment_rules.description: Card children must stay within card bounds
Page children must not overflow container horizontally

sibling_alignment_rules.description: All navbar items must be on the same horizontal line

no_overlap_rules.description: Cards in a list must not overlap each other

computed_value_rules.selector: body, .ac-input, .ac-btn, .ac-card, h1, h2, h3, p, label, a, span, div
computed_value_rules.__comment: Scale is rem-based; these px values cover 14px AND 16px root font-sizes
computed_value_rules.description: Every rendered text element's computed font-size must be on the scale
Input must have non-zero border-width in its computed style
Buttons must be ≥ 32px tall for fingertip tap (relaxed from 40 to allow sm variants)

contrast_rules.selector: body, .ac-card, .ac-input, .ac-btn, h1, h2, h3, p, a, label, span
contrast_rules.description: WCAG AA — text vs background contrast ≥ 4.5:1
